title: aeschynanthus poilanei
intro: Aeschynanthus poilanei, also known as the Polilana Lip, is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family, native to Vietnam. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus poilanei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Aeschynanthus poilanei is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and the dried roots and leaves are commonly used in traditional herbal medicine.
